2605.05715.title: Decodable but Not Corrected by Fixed Residual-Stream Linear Steering: Evidence from Medical LLM Failure Regimes
2605.05715.paper_summary: Can linearly decodable failure signals in LLM hidden states be leveraged to correct those failures? We investigate this classification-correction gap via Overthinking (OT)--a stable behavioral regime (Jaccard >= 0.81, 94% inter-annotator agreement) in medical QA where models answer correctly under resampling yet fail in extended chain-of-thought. OT is linearly decodable at 71.6% balanced accuracy (p < 10^{-16}). Yet five families of fixed linear steering (29 configurations, n=1,273) all yield Delta ~= 0, with identical null results cross-architecture (Qwen2.5-7B) and cross-domain (MMLU-STEM). Three convergent lines of evidence suggest representational entanglement: the OT direction has 85-88% overlap with task-critical computation (specificity ratio <= 0.152); non-targeted shared-direction steering damages accuracy (-12.1pp); and LEACE concept erasure damages accuracy (-3.6pp, p=0.01), while 10 random erasures produce Delta=+0.3pp. The per-instance probe-steering correlation is r=-0.002 (p=0.97). Positively, the same probe enables selective abstention (held-out AUROC=0.610, exceeding all five uncertainty baselines, p=0.009): decodable failure structure supports post-generation reliability estimation even when the fixed linear steering family cannot exploit it for correction.
2605.05715.paper_summary_zh: 可以利用 LLM 隱藏狀態中的線性可解失敗信號來修正這些失敗嗎？我們通過 Overthinking (OT) 來研究這一分類-修正差距——這是一種穩定的行為模式（Jaccard >= 0.81，94% 的標註者一致性）在醫療問答中，模型在重採樣下能正確回答，但在擴展的思考鏈中失敗。OT 的線性可解性達到 71.6% 的平衡準確率（p < 10^{-16}）。然而，五個固定線性引導的家族（29 種配置，n=1,273）均產生 Delta ~= 0，且在架構間（Qwen2.5-7B）和領域間（MMLU-STEM）結果相同。三條收斂的證據表明表徵糾纏：OT 方向與任務關鍵計算的重疊率為 85-88%（特異性比率 <= 0.152）；非目標共享方向的引導損害準確性（-12.1pp）；而 LEACE 概念抹除損害準確性（-3.6pp，p=0.01），而 10 次隨機抹除產生 Delta=+0.3pp。每個實例的探針引導相關性為 r=-0.002（p=0.97）。積極地，同一探針使得選擇性棄權成為可能（持出 AUROC=0.610，超過所有五個不確定性基準，p=0.009）：可解的失敗結構支持生成後的可靠性評估，即使固定線性引導家族無法利用它進行修正。
2605.05715.author: Ming Liu et.al.
